items.name: Lee, Jim
items.text:
Jim Lee-inspired modern superhero illustration.
Highly detailed inked linework.
Dynamic anatomy with exaggerated but realistic proportions.
Strong muscle structure and defined form rendering.
Cross-hatched shading with controlled rendering detail.
Crisp contour lines and precise inking.
Dramatic superhero composition.
High-energy action illustration style.
Clean but highly complex visual detailing.
Modern DC Comics aesthetic.
Sharp edges and polished line discipline.
No painterly texture.
No soft rendering.
items.author: Unknown

items.name: McFarlane, Todd
items.text:
Todd McFarlane-inspired dark comic illustration.
Highly dynamic exaggerated anatomy.
Extreme foreshortening and dramatic poses.
Intricate, energetic ink linework.
Dense cross-hatching and textured shading.
Dark atmospheric comic book style.
Stylized realism with heightened anatomy.
Sinister and energetic visual tone.
High contrast black ink rendering.
Chaotic but controlled composition design.
Emphasis on motion, tension, and impact.
Modern 1990s independent comic aesthetic.
Spawn-era comic art influence.
Not painterly.
Not flat animation.
items.author: Unknown

items.name: Liefeld, Rob
items.text:
Rob Liefeld-inspired extreme 1990s comic illustration.
Highly exaggerated superhero anatomy with distorted proportions.
Oversized upper body with extreme musculature emphasis.
Small or simplified lower legs and reduced anatomical realism.
Dynamic extreme action posing.
Heavy costume design with straps, armor, and utility gear.
Excessive pouches and tactical accessories.
Bold ink outlines with heavy shadow blocking.
Chaotic but energetic composition design.
Aggressive 90s Image Comics aesthetic.
Stylized anatomy prioritizing impact over realism.
High contrast action illustration style.
Rough, dense costume detailing.
Not anatomically accurate.
Not subtle or minimal design.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Campbell, J. Scott
items.text:
J. Scott Campbell-inspired comic illustration.
Stylized anime-influenced western superhero art.
Highly idealized anatomy with elegant proportions.
Slim waist with exaggerated hourglass figure design.
Smooth clean linework with polished edges.
Expressive facial features with large stylized eyes.
Attractive pin-up aesthetic.
Graceful, fluid posing and body language.
Lightweight rendering with controlled shading.
Clean costume design with minimal visual clutter.
Bright, polished comic book color aesthetic.
Modern Image Comics / Marvel pin-up style influence.
Highly designed, visually appealing character focus.
Not gritty realism.
Not heavy texture or cross-hatching.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Larson, Erik
items.text:
Erik Larsen-inspired comic illustration.
Highly dynamic exaggerated anatomy.
Powerful exaggerated musculature and movement.
Organic flowing body structure.
Energetic inked linework.
Action-heavy composition design.
Bold superhero poses.
Cartoon-realism hybrid style.
Savage Dragon comic aesthetic.
Expressive and kinetic figure drawing.
Less rigid anatomy, more fluid motion.
Extreme but readable exaggeration.
Not minimalist.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Valentino, Jim
items.text:
Jim Valentino-inspired comic illustration.
Clean stylized superhero design.
Moderate anatomy stylization.
Strong silhouette readability.
Simple but effective costume design.
Clear linework with minimal clutter.
Story-driven composition.
Expressive character acting.
Balanced proportions.
1990s Image Comics aesthetic.
Readable visual storytelling focus.
Less exaggerated than extreme 90s styles.
Not heavily detailed rendering.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Silvastri, Mark
items.text:
Mark Silvestri-inspired comic illustration.
Clean detailed inked linework.
Highly polished superhero anatomy.
Balanced realistic proportions with stylized enhancement.
Sleek muscular figures.
Controlled cross-hatching and rendering.
Dynamic but grounded poses.
90s Image Comics aesthetic.
Sharp facial structure and expressive eyes.
Cinematic action composition.
Detailed but readable costume design.
Not overly exaggerated anatomy.
Not cartoonish.
items.author: BTP_Art
